engagement.name: CostSmart IT Optimization
engagement.desired_outcome: Reduce IT operations costs by 20-30% within 12 months while maintaining SLA compliance and regulatory audit readiness
engagement.scope: IT infrastructure and operations for retail banking division (2,400 staff, 180 branches, 3 data centers)
constraints: No disruption to customer-facing banking services
Current vendor contracts locked until Q3 2027
Workforce reduction not an option (works council agreement)
